title: The Cantonments Act, 2006
full_text: The Cantonments Act, 2006 छावनी अधिनियम, 2006 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200641 Act Number: 41 Enactment Date: 2006-09-13 Act Year: 2006 Short Title: The Cantonments Act, 2006 Hindi Title: छावनी अधिनियम, 2006 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the administration of cantonments with a view to impart greater democratisation, improvement of their financial base to make provisions for developmental activities and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Defence Enforcement Date: 18-12-2006 Notification: 18th December, 2006, vide notification No. S.R.O. 15(E), dated 18th December, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Schedule 1. SCHEDULE I. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. SCHEDULE II. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 3. SCHEDULE III Order Appendix Forms Schedule 4. SCHEDULE IV. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 5. SCHEDULE V. Streets CHAPTER XI MARKET, SLAUGHTER-HOUSES, TRADES AND OCCUPATIONS Trades and occupations General provisions Entry, inspection and seizure Import of cattle and flesh CHAPTER XII SPIRITUOUS LIQUORS AND INTROXICATING DRUGS CHAPTER XIII PUBLIC SAFETY AND SUPRESSION OF NUISANCES General Nuisances Dogs Traffic Prevention of fire, etc. CHAPTER XIV REMOVAL AND EXCLUSION FROM CANTONMNETS AND SUPPRESSION OF SEXUAL IMMORALITY CHAPTER XV POWERS, PROCEDURES, PENALTIES AND APPEALS Entry and inspection Powers and duties of police officers Notices Recovery of Money Committees of Arbitration Prosecutions General Penalty Provisions Limitation Suits Appeals and Revision CHAPTER XVI RULES AND BYE-LAWS CHAPTER XVII SUPPLEMENTAL PROVISIONS Section 1.
